1.$description: Resting lift — subtle depth for always-visible surfaces.

ease-quick.$description: Ease (house) curve · quick. Name the property at the call site — e.g. transition: color var(--motion-ease-quick).

ease-base.$description: Ease (house) curve · base. Default for most state transitions.

ease-long.$description: Ease (house) curve · long. Larger, slower state changes.

ease-out-quick.$description: Decelerate (fast start, soft stop) · quick — entrances and reveals.

ease-out-long.$description: Decelerate · long — large entrances arriving on screen.

fade-quick.$description: Opacity · quick · ease. Drop-in: transition: var(--motion-fade-quick).

fade-long.$description: Opacity · long · ease. Slow fade for overlays.

move-quick.$description: Transform · quick · ease. Drop-in: transition: var(--motion-move-quick).

move-long.$description: Transform · long · ease. Panels, drawers, larger spatial moves.
